---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a feature, capability, or extension
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem**

What concern is this trying to address? Reference v0.1 / v0.2 sections
if applicable.

**User story** (1–2 sentences: who, what changes, why it matters)

> 

**Use cases** — split the story into implementable slices ([`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)). Add/remove rows.

| # | Use case (short title) | Actor | Preconditions | Main flow (steps) | Success criteria |
|---|-------------------------|-------|----------------|-------------------|------------------|
| 1 | | | | | |
| 2 | | | | | |

**MVP suggestion** — which use case # should land first?

**Proposed approach**

Sketch the design. Note any port (Storage, LLM, MatcherPlugin, …) the
change would touch.

**Out of scope**

Anything that should *not* be reinterpreted into this work.

**Milestone**

Which milestone does this fit?
